folder_records.name: ARCHIVE
folder_records.role: Archive zone for old, inactive, or legacy materials that should not stay in active root.
forbidden_writes: Active task outputs without task routing
folder_records.agent_instruction: Use ARCHIVE for storage, not for active execution outputs.
folder_records.artifact_policy: Keep archive evidence pointers in ARTIFACTS by TASK_ID when relevant.
notes: No delete policy applies.

folder_records.name: ARTIFACTS
folder_records.role: Primary evidence root for task outputs, proofs, manifests, and final bundles by TASK_ID.
outputs: Task outputs and final bundle artifacts
folder_records.agent_instruction: Always write task outputs into a dedicated TASK_ID folder.
folder_records.artifact_policy: All proofs and bundles must be registered by TASK_ID.
notes: Artifacts are evidence surfaces, not canonical authority.

folder_records.name: OBSERVED
folder_records.role: Read-only historical and observed contour copies for reference analysis.
folder_records.agent_instruction: Treat OBSERVED content as read-only reference unless a dedicated task says otherwise.
folder_records.artifact_policy: Use ARTIFACTS for proof of analysis performed on observed copies.
notes: No deep mutation from root mapping tasks.

folder_records.name: PC_ENGINEERING_ROOM
folder_records.role: Active engineering headquarters for architecture, reviews, labs, maps, and decision preparation.
allowed_writes: Engineering docs, maps, and lab outputs
outputs: Engineering maps, plans, and controlled reports
folder_records.agent_instruction: Keep active engineering work here; publish proof copies to ARTIFACTS.
folder_records.artifact_policy: Any task result proof should also be stored under ARTIFACTS\<TASK_ID>\.
notes: Engineering room is not admission authority.

folder_records.name: SSH_COMMAND_LIBRARY
folder_records.role: Library of SSH route knowledge, diagnostics, tools, and tested recipes.
outputs: Reusable route instructions and helper tools
folder_records.agent_instruction: Keep route tools here; keep usage proof in ARTIFACTS.
folder_records.artifact_policy: Route usage evidence must be copied or pointed from ARTIFACTS by TASK_ID.
notes: No secrets in route docs.

folder_records.name: 00_SYSTEM_MAPS
folder_records.role: System maps, folder maps, address maps, and machine-readable structure maps.
folder_records.agent_instruction: Write only files that match 00_SYSTEM_MAPS purpose and keep evidence in ARTIFACTS.
folder_records.artifact_policy: Task-level proof copy belongs in ARTIFACTS.
notes: Subfolder policy follows engineering room boundaries.

rules: Task artifacts must be stored under E:\\IMPERIUM\\ARTIFACTS\\<TASK_ID>\\.
No secrets in maps or semantic descriptors.
notes: This is a draft baseline semantic map and should be refined by review tasks.
